name: Crispy Leaves
steps: Pick leaves all the same size (15cm).
Bring to boil 12L of water with 50g salt.
Blanch leaves for 15 seconds, until bright green, and refresh in iced water.
Blend each type of leaf separately.
Once fully blended, strain to hold back the leaves correctly, making sure no fiber breaks through.
Spread the leaves out flat and not touching on a dehydrator tray.
Dry in the dehydrator at 55C for 8 hours.
Once dry, remove from the dehydrator and store in an airtight container with silica gel.
Blend together to form a fine powder.
Take out leaves and spray them with the oil.
Using a small sieve, dust leaves lightly with the wasabi powder.
Arrange the leaves neatly with concrete flower and logan flower inside a serving bowl.
